headline: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Analog Devices, CrowdStrike, Expedia, Instacart, Live Nation, Qualcomm, Seagate, Starbucks, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading higher as shell-shocked traders and investors return to a holiday-shortened trading week, where all the major indices are approaching or already in correction territory (down 10%). If we finish this week lower again, it will be the sixth straight week of losses for investors. The last time the S&P ...
